# Samsung Samsung Ads – Software Engineer Intern - TV Plus Interview Preparation

Prepare for your Samsung Samsung Ads – Software Engineer Intern - TV Plus internship interview with comprehensive practice questions and AI-powered feedback.

**Location:** Mountain View, CA
**Application Status:** Currently Closed

## Interview Practice Features

- Real interview questions from Samsung
- AI-powered feedback and scoring
- Technical and behavioral question practice
- Company-specific preparation tips
- Industry insights and trends

## About This Opportunity

Samsung is offering a Samsung Ads – Software Engineer Intern - TV Plus internship position in Mountain View, CA. This is an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in software engineering.




## Interview Preparation Tips

1. Research Samsung's products and mission
2. Practice coding problems and system design
3. Prepare behavioral examples using the STAR method
4. Review your resume and be ready to discuss projects
5. Prepare thoughtful questions about the role and company

## Start Your Interview Practice

Use our AI-powered interview practice tool to prepare for your Samsung interview and increase your chances of success.
